title: Run a complete live game from lobby to game over
description: Verifies a leader can create a room, add enough players, start the game, progress through core phases, and reach GAME_OVER with the winner shown.

steps.description: Add players until the room has at least 6 players
Proceed to the role generation phase
Assign roles to players to proceed to role binding completion
Advance phases through the day and night cycle until the game ends
Verify the game over view is displayed with a winner announcement

title: Player joins a room and appears in the leader lobby
description: Verifies a player can join using the room code and then is visible in the leader’s player grid.

steps.description: Note the room code shown in the leader room header
Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using the noted room code
Fill a new player name into the name field
Verify a join confirmation is visible and the player appears in the leader player grid

title: Join display view to a room and see real-time game state updates
description: Verifies the display can join an active room and stays in sync as the leader advances phases.

steps.description: Create a new room and set a display PIN
Note the room code shown in the leader room header
Enter the room code or display PIN from the leader
In the leader view, add players until at least 6 and start the game
In the leader view, advance to a later phase beyond the lobby
Verify the display shows the current in-game phase and player cards for the room

title: Show voting results and recap reveals on display as they occur
description: Verifies the display updates to show voting results and then the recap reveal sequence when the leader progresses through those phases.

steps.description: Create a new room and set a display PIN
Note the room code shown in the leader room header
Enter the room code or display PIN from the leader
In the leader view, add players until at least 6, start the game, and complete role binding
In the leader view, proceed to day voting and submit votes
In the leader view, progress through night and enter morning recap
Verify the display presents voting results and then shows the morning recap reveals

title: Login to leader interface successfully
description: Leader can log in with valid credentials and lands on the leader interface.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the leader interface

title: Operate day discussion speaker queue and advance to voting
description: Verifies the leader can run the timed speaker queue during day discussion and then proceed to day voting.

steps.description: Add players until the room has at least 6 players
Assign roles to players to complete role binding
Advance through speakers until the queue completes
Proceed to the day voting phase
Verify the day voting UI is displayed

title: Run night actions and view morning recap sequence
description: Verifies the leader can advance into night, complete night actions, and then see the morning recap reveal night events.

steps.description: Add players until the room has at least 6 players
Assign roles to players to complete role binding
Advance phases until the night phase is reached
Execute required night actions to complete the night phase
Advance to the morning recap phase
Verify the morning recap view is displayed and shows revealed night events

title: Admin can log in and reach the admin dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can log in with valid credentials and is taken to the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Resolve day vote with tie-breaker path
description: Verifies a tied day vote routes the game into the tie-breaker phase and allows continuing the game afterward.

steps.description: Add players until the room has at least 6 players
Assign roles to players to complete role binding
Advance to the day voting phase
Cast votes to create a tie between at least two players
Verify the day tiebreaker phase is displayed

title: View activity details with financials, charts, linked room, and location info
description: Verifies an admin can open an activity detail page and see financial and attendance charts, a linked game room card if present, and location information rendered.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Click an activity card to open its details
Verify financial summary and attendance charts are displayed
Verify location information and the linked game room section are visible

title: Resolve day vote with justification path
description: Verifies a non-tied day vote proceeds to a justification phase for the accused and then advances to the next phase.

steps.description: Add players until the room has at least 6 players
Assign roles to players to complete role binding
Advance to the day voting phase
Cast votes so a single player has the most votes
Verify the day justification phase is displayed

title: Create a new activity with offers and pricing
description: Verifies an admin can create an activity with a location, offers, price, and description and then sees it in the activities list.

steps.description: Click the navigation option to open activities management
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Toggle at least one available location offer for the activity
Fill 25 into the base price field
Fill Test activity description into the description field
Verify the new activity appears in the activities list

title: Create a booking for an activity from the activities area
description: Verifies an admin can create a new booking for a selected activity and the booking appears in the bookings list afterward.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Select an activity in the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Test Name into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid payment amount into the payment amount field
Mark the booking as paid or free
Verify the booking appears in the bookings list

title: Unlink a linked game room from an activity
description: Verifies an admin can unlink a game room from an activity and the UI no longer shows the room as linked afterward.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Click an activity card to open its details
If no linked game room is shown, return to the activities list and open a different activity
Click the control to unlink the linked game room
Verify the activity no longer shows a linked game room

title: Create a staff member with role assignment
description: Verifies an admin can add a new staff member, assign at least one role, and see the staff member in the staff list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to staff management
Start adding a new staff member
Fill Staff Test User into the staff name field
Fill staff.test.user@example.com into the staff email field
Assign at least one role to the staff member
Verify the new staff member appears in the staff list

title: Create a location with offers
description: Admin can create a new location with at least one offer and the new location appears in the locations list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to manage locations
Fill a unique location name into the location name field
Fill valid location details into the remaining required fields
Add a new offer to the location
Fill valid offer details into the offer fields
Verify the new location appears in the locations list

title: Navigate from landing page to leader interface entry
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page to the leader interface entry point successfully.

steps.description: Click the leader interface navigation option
Verify the leader login page or the leader dashboard is displayed

title: Edit an existing activity and see updates reflected
description: Verifies an admin can edit an existing activity and the activities list reflects the updated values.

steps.description: Click the navigation option to open activities management
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Fill 20 into the base price field
Fill Activity to edit into the description field
Open the activity options for the newly created activity
Fill 30 into the base price field
Verify the activities list shows the activity with the updated price

title: Edit an existing booking and see changes reflected
description: Verifies an admin can edit a booking and the bookings list reflects the updated booking after submission.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Select an activity in the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Edit Seed into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid payment amount into the payment amount field
Select the booking that was just created
Fill Booking Edited Name into the name field
Verify the bookings list shows the updated booking entry

title: Prevent game start when fewer than six players are present
description: Verifies the leader cannot start the game until the minimum player threshold is met and an in-UI validation state is shown.

steps.description: Add players until the room has fewer than 6 players
Verify the game does not start and a minimum-player validation error is visible

title: Lock an activity from the activity details page
description: Verifies an admin can lock an activity and the activity is clearly indicated as locked in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Click an activity card to open its details
Click the control to lock the activity
Verify the activity is indicated as locked

title: Navigate from landing page to admin login
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page to the admin login page successfully.

steps.description: Click the admin panel navigation option
Verify the admin login page is displayed

title: Replay a past match from the display replay controls
description: Verifies the display can enter replay mode and step through a previously completed match using replay controls.

steps.description: Create a new room and set a display PIN
Note the room code shown in the leader room header
Add players until at least 6 players
Start the game and advance phases until the game ends
Enter the room code or display PIN from the leader
Use the match replay controls to load the completed match
Verify the display shows replayed match state and responds to replay navigation

title: Delete a booking from bookings management
description: Verifies an admin can delete a booking and it no longer appears in the bookings list after confirmation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to bookings
Create a new booking from the bookings page
Select an activity in the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Delete Seed into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid payment amount into the payment amount field
Select the booking that was just created
Verify the deleted booking no longer appears in the bookings list

title: Edit an existing location and persist changes
description: Admin can edit a location’s details and the updated information is reflected in the locations list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to manage locations
Fill a unique location name into the location name field
Fill valid location details into the remaining required fields
Open the newly created location for editing
Update the location name field to a new unique value
Verify the updated location appears in the locations list

title: Edit a staff member details
description: Verifies an admin can edit an existing staff member and the staff list reflects the updated details after saving.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to staff management
Start adding a new staff member
Fill Staff Edit Seed into the staff name field
Fill staff.edit.seed@example.com into the staff email field
Assign at least one role to the staff member
Select the staff member that was just created
Fill Staff Edited Name into the staff name field
Verify the staff list shows the updated staff entry

title: Delete an activity with confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete an activity after confirming and it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation option to open activities management
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Fill 15 into the base price field
Fill Activity to delete into the description field
Open the activity options for the newly created activity
Verify the deleted activity no longer appears in the activities list

title: Toggle bookings and costs tables on an activity
description: Verifies an admin can show and hide the bookings and costs tables on an activity detail page and the corresponding table content appears when enabled.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Click an activity card to open its details
Toggle the bookings table to show it
Toggle the costs table to show it
Verify the bookings table is displayed
Verify the costs table is displayed

title: Delete a staff member with confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete a staff member after confirming and the staff member is removed from the staff list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to staff management
Start adding a new staff member
Fill Staff Delete Seed into the staff name field
Fill staff.delete.seed@example.com into the staff email field
Assign at least one role to the staff member
Select the staff member that was just created
Verify the deleted staff member no longer appears in the staff list

title: Delete a location after confirming deletion
description: Admin can delete a location and it is removed from the locations list after confirmation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to manage locations
Fill a unique location name into the location name field
Fill valid location details into the remaining required fields
Initiate deletion for the newly created location
Verify the deleted location no longer appears in the locations list

title: Prevent player join when name is missing
description: Verifies the join form requires a player name and blocks submission with an in-UI validation error.

steps.description: Note the room code shown in the leader room header
Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using the noted room code
Attempt to submit the join request
Verify a name-required validation error is visible and the player is not joined

title: Reject joining a room with a duplicate player name
description: Verifies the join flow prevents a second player from joining with a name that already exists in the room and shows an in-UI error state.

steps.description: Note the room code shown in the leader room header
Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using the noted room code
Fill a player name into the name field
Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using the noted room code
Fill the same player name into the name field
Verify a duplicate-name error is visible and only one player with that name is present in the room

title: Show booking form validation when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the booking form prevents submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Submit the booking form without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Verify the booking is not created in the bookings list

title: Reject display join attempt with invalid room code or PIN
description: Verifies the display prevents joining a room when the room code or PIN is invalid and shows an in-UI error state.

steps.description: Enter an invalid room code or PIN
Verify an invalid-room error is visible and the display does not enter a room

title: Required-field validation blocks activity creation
description: Verifies the activity form prevents submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Click the navigation option to open activities management
Leave at least one required field empty
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Block leader login with invalid credentials
description: Leader cannot log in with incorrect credentials and an error state is shown.

steps.description: Fill invalid-username into the username field
Fill invalid-password into the password field
Verify an invalid-credentials error is visible

title: Reject joining with an invalid room code in the join page
description: Verifies the player join page does not allow joining when the room code is invalid and shows an in-UI error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using a nonexistent room code
Fill a player name into the name field
Verify an invalid-room error is visible and the player is not joined

title: Admin sees an error on invalid credentials
description: Verifies an admin entering invalid credentials sees a login error and is not logged in.

steps.description: Fill invalid-admin@example.com into the username field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an invalid-credentials error is visible

title: Prevent creating a location when required fields are missing
description: Admin cannot submit the create location form with missing required fields and sees validation errors.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to manage locations
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
